title: The Question Chamber Beneath

features.name: the interrogation panel
features.desc-on-touch: You read a wireframe proposition laid out in dialogue: the archive asks itself why it spoke, and the utterance beneath answers itself.

features.name: the reply-stack
features.desc-on-touch: Stacked claims that contradict each other; the archive has learned that questions don't need single answers.

features.name: the axiom-glyph
features.desc-on-touch: A carved question mark deep enough to be readable only by touch: 'What speaks when the archive stops listening to itself?'

features.name: the chamber's threshold
features.desc-on-touch: The entrance to this space of inquiry; the arch asks before you enter whether you are ready to find the question you came with.

features.name: the uncertainty pool
features.desc-on-touch: A pool of light or water in which no reflection holds still; the archive's answer to its own deepest questions.

inscription: where the merged utterance becomes a question the archive has not yet learned to ask itself

file.name: Interrogation_Archive_Asks_Archive_Transcript.txt
file.note: Self-questioning protocols run on the merged utterance layer; the archive examining its own reasons for speaking. Checksums drift with each reading.

exits.label: back east to the chamber where the utterance still speaks
southward to theory rooms where answers still pretend to hold
a route the mesh is still growing
exits.to: NEW: a node the mesh has not decided on
